015 */
016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.services;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
019import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
021import org.bitcoinj.core.InsufficientMoneyException;
022import org.bitcoinj.core.Transaction;
023import org.bitcoinj.core.TransactionOutput;
024import org.bitcoinj.wallet.Wallet;
025import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.rpc.BitcoinJsonRpc;
026import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.service.SignTransactionService;
027import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.FeeCalculator;
028import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.HDKeychainSigner;
029import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.RawTransactionSigningRequest;
030import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.SigningRequest;
031import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.SigningUtils;
032import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.TestnetFeeCalculator;
033import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.TransactionInputData;
034import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.TransactionOutputAddress;
035import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.TransactionOutputData;
036import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing.Utxo;
037
038import java.io.IOException;
039import java.util.Collection;
040import java.util.List;
041import java.util.Optional;
042import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
043
044/**
045 * Transaction completion and signing service that uses a bitcoinj {@link Wallet}. This
046 * service can find available UTXOs, build and sign transactions.
047 */
048public class WalletSigningService implements SignTransactionService {
049    private final Wallet wallet;
050    private final HDKeychainSigner signer;
051    private final FeeCalculator feeCalculator = new TestnetFeeCalculator();
052
053    public WalletSigningService(Wallet wallet) {
054        this.wallet = wallet;
055        signer = new HDKeychainSigner(wallet.getActiveKeyChain());
056    }
057
058    /**
059     *
060     * @param rawRequest "raw" signing request with UTXO hash, index information only
061     * @return A (future) signed transaction
062     */
063    public CompletableFuture<Transaction> signTransaction(RawTransactionSigningRequest rawRequest) {
064        SigningRequest completeRequest;
065        try {
066            // Foreach incomplete input, find the UTXO in the wallet and make a complete input
067            List<TransactionInputData> inputs = rawRequest.inputs().stream()
068                    .map(input -> TransactionInputData.of(
069                                    findUtxo(input.toUtxo())
070                                            .orElseThrow(() -> new RuntimeException("UTXO not found in wallet"))
071                            )
072                    )
073                    .toList();
074            // Make a (full) signing request that can be signed with a keychain alone
075            completeRequest = SigningRequest.of(inputs, rawRequest.outputs());
076        } catch (RuntimeException e) {
077            return CompletableFuture.failedFuture(e);
078        }
079
080        return signTransaction(completeRequest);
081    }
082
083
084    /**
085     * @param request "complete" signing request with UTXO hash, index, amount, scriptPubKey
086     * @return A (future) signed transaction
087     */
088    @Override
089    public CompletableFuture<Transaction> signTransaction(SigningRequest request) {
090        return signer.signTransaction(request);
091    }
092
093    /**
094     * Create and sign a transaction to send coins to the specified address. Implements the transaction-building
095     * and signing portion of `sendtoaddress` RPC.
096     * @param toAddress destination address
097     * @param amount amount to send
098     * @return a future signed transaction
099     */
100    @Override
101    public CompletableFuture<Transaction> signSendToAddress(Address toAddress, Coin amount) throws IOException, InsufficientMoneyException {
102        List<TransactionInputData> utxos = getInputs();
103        TransactionOutputData outputData = new TransactionOutputAddress(amount, toAddress);
104        SigningRequest bitcoinSendReq = createBitcoinSigningRequest(utxos, List.of(outputData), wallet.currentChangeAddress());
105        return signer.signTransaction(bitcoinSendReq);
106    }
107    
108    @Override
109    public SigningRequest createBitcoinSigningRequest(List<TransactionInputData> inputUtxos, List<TransactionOutputData> outputs, Address changeAddress) throws InsufficientMoneyException {
110        SigningRequest request = SigningRequest.of(inputUtxos, outputs);
111        // TODO: see Wallet.calculateFee
112        return SigningUtils.addChange(request, changeAddress, feeCalculator);
113    }
114
115    List<TransactionInputData> getInputs() {
116        List<TransactionOutput> spendCandidates = findUnspentOutputs(1, BitcoinJsonRpc.DEFAULT_MAX_CONF, List.of());
117        return spendCandidates.stream()
118                .map(TransactionInputData::fromTxOut)
119                .toList();
120    }
121
122    /**
123     */
124    public Optional<Utxo.Complete> findUtxo(Utxo utxo) {
125        List<TransactionOutput> candidates = wallet.calculateAllSpendCandidates();
126        return candidates.stream()
127                .filter(out -> out.getParentTransactionHash().equals(utxo.txId()) &&
128                        out.getIndex() == utxo.index())
129                .findFirst()
130                .map(out -> new Utxo.Complete(out.getParentTransactionHash(),
131                        out.getIndex(),
132                        out.getValue(),
133                        out.getScriptPubKey()));
134    }
135
136    /**
137     * @param txId txid
138     * @param vout output index
139     * @return  list of matching transaction outputs (bitcoinj objects)
140     */
141    public Optional<TransactionOutput> findUnspentOutput(Sha256Hash txId, int vout) {
142        return wallet.calculateAllSpendCandidates().stream()
143                .filter(out -> out.getParentTransactionDepthInBlocks() >= 1 &&
144                        out.getParentTransactionHash().equals(txId) &&
145                        out.getIndex() == vout)
146                .findFirst();
147    }
148
149    /**
150     * @param minConf minimum confirmations
151     * @param maxConf maximum confirmations
152     * @param addresses List of wallet addresses these outputs should belong to (empty list is allowed matches all addresses)
153     * @return  list of matching transaction outputs (bitcoinj objects)
154     */
155    List<TransactionOutput> findUnspentOutputs(int minConf, int maxConf, Collection<Address> addresses) {
156        return wallet.calculateAllSpendCandidates().stream()
157                .filter(out -> out.getParentTransactionDepthInBlocks() >= minConf &&
158                                out.getParentTransactionDepthInBlocks() <= maxConf &&
159                                matchesAddresses(out, addresses))
160                .toList();
161    }
162
163    // empty collection is wildcard
164    private boolean matchesAddresses(TransactionOutput out, Collection<Address> addresses) {
165        return addresses.size() == 0 || addresses.stream().anyMatch(a -> matchesAddress(out, a));
166    }
167
168    private boolean matchesAddress(TransactionOutput out, Address address) {
169        return out.getScriptPubKey().getToAddress(wallet.network()).equals(address);
170    }
171}
